theme_and_archetype.vibe: Gritty, surviving, historical, melancholic, living world

navigation.mobile: bottom-0 fixed w-full border-t border-stone-800 bg-stone-950/90 backdrop-blur-md z-50
navigation.desktop: left-0 top-0 fixed h-full w-64 border-r border-stone-800 bg-stone-950 z-50

buttons.primary: bg-orange-700 hover:bg-orange-800 text-stone-200 font-bold tracking-wider rounded-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-stone-700 hover:border-orange-900 text-stone-300 rounded-sm

components.inputs: bg-stone-950 border border-stone-800 text-stone-200 placeholder:text-stone-600 rounded-sm focus:border-orange-700 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-orange-700

login.layout: Centered card over cinematic background. Full-screen h-screen flex items-center justify-center.
login.elements: Logo/Title (H1), Email/Password inputs, Login CTA, Register link.
login.visuals: Dark ash/ember background image with an overlay of bg-stone-950/80.

world_map.layout: Grid or map-view with location cards.
world_map.elements: List of Kingdoms, Cities, Villages, Castles. Filters. Time advance button ('Bir gün geç').

city_detail.layout: Bento Grid (Control Room style). Dense data.
city_detail.elements: Population stat block, Economy/Prices table, Security/Wealth bars, Notable NPCs list, Available Quests.

character_sheet.layout: Two-column grid on desktop, single stack on mobile.
character_sheet.elements: Vitals (Health, Age, Wealth, Reputation). Skills/Profession. Equipment slots.

inventory_economy.elements: Player inventory grid, Market prices table (Wheat, Meat, Iron, Wood, Cloth, Weapons) showing Supply/Demand trends.

npc_list_detail.layout: Master-detail view (Sidebar list, Main chat/info area).
npc_list_detail.elements: NPC Portrait/Icon, Relationship Score, Personality, Wealth, Family Tree. Template-based Chat interface.

relationships.elements: Tabs for Friends, Neutral, Enemies. Quick action to interact/chat.

history_chronicle.elements: Chronological list of world events (Wars, marriages, deaths, market crashes).

battle_screen.elements: Combat text log (top/center), Action buttons (Attack, Defend, Flee) fixed at bottom.

visual_enhancers.texture: Add a fixed full-screen div with a subtle noise/grain background (opacity-20) pointer-events-none.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 1px solid borders everywhere to mimic old ledger books.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Keep shadows minimal. Rely on borders for depth.
visual_enhancers.motion: Subtle fade-ins. Hover states should feel like an ember lighting up (transition to burnt orange).

testing.required_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='city-item-3', data-testid='advance-time-button')

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the UI using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI (.js files, NOT .tsx).
Enforce the 'ashen world' theme using the stone and orange color palette provided.
Use 'Cinzel' for headings and 'Lora' for body text. Load these from Google Fonts in index.css.
Do NOT use generic rounded cards with soft shadows. Use sharp (rounded-sm or rounded-none) bordered cards to simulate medieval ledgers.
Add a fixed grainy noise overlay to the app to simulate parchment/ash texture.
Organize complex data (Market prices, NPC lists) using dense Shadcn tables and tabs.
Include a 'Time Advance' (Bir gün geç) button accessible in the main navigation or header.
All navigation labels and UI text must be in Turkish.
